title: A few days ago, I posted here, and several people asked me what strategy I was using. I shared it truthfullyand now is the time to put those doubts to rest.
author: Angela-Cole
selftext:
A few days ago, several friends asked about the strategy behind this particular trade. I shared it with them candidly, and they managed to make a profit as well.

To be honest, there is nothing overly complex about it; it simply boils down to the approach that has been consistently effective for me recently:

Trading with the trend, rather than attempting to guess the exact market top or bottom;

Patiently waiting for pullbacks, avoiding the impulse to blindly chase rallies or panic-sell during dips;

Utilizing EMAs to determine the overall market direction, while treating RSI and MACD merely as tools for auxiliary confirmation.

The most crucial point is that I no longer strive for absolute perfection; instead, I have shifted my focus to identifying more precise entry points and have learned to take profits early and at the right moment.

My current performance is still far from perfect, and I remain in a continuous process of learning and exploration; consequently, this specific method may not be suitable for everyone.

However, compared to the past, this strategy has indeed generated more stable and consistent returns for meIwon't proactively share with you, but if you're interested enough to ask, I'd be happy to share.
